mono.purpose: Identifiers, XML, URLs, commands, and protocol values.

components.name: Primary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: var(--accent); color: #fff; border: 1px solid var(--accent); border-radius: var(--radius); padding: 9px 16px; font: 500 13.5px var(--font-sans); cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: var(--accent-hover); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 0; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px var(--accent-soft); }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: var(--surface); color: var(--text); border: 1px solid var(--border-strong); border-radius: var(--radius); padding: 9px 16px; font: 500 13.5px var(--font-sans); cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: var(--bg-soft); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 0; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px var(--accent-soft); }

components.name: Text Field
components.description: Free text, URLs, and pasted identifiers.
components.css: .ds-input { background: var(--surface); color: var(--text); border: 1px solid var(--border-strong); border-radius: var(--radius); padding: 9px 12px; font: 13.5px var(--font-sans); } .ds-input:hover { border-color: var(--text-dim); } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: 0; border-color: var(--accent); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px var(--accent-soft); }

components.name: Chip
components.css: .ds-chip { background: var(--surface); color: var(--text-muted); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 999px; padding: 7px 12px; font: 13px var(--font-sans); cursor: pointer; } .ds-chip:hover { color: var(--text); border-color: var(--border-strong); background: var(--bg-soft); } .ds-chip:focus-visible { outline: 0; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px var(--accent-soft); }

components.name: Information Card
components.css: .ds-card { background: var(--surface); color: var(--text); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--radius); padding: 20px; font: 14px/1.5 var(--font-sans); } .ds-card p { color: var(--text-muted); margin: 6px 0 0; }

narrative.overview: A precise, quiet specialist tool. Familiar controls and restrained color keep attention on metadata and protocol behavior.

rules.name: The One Signal Rule
rules.body: Teal communicates action or state; it is not decoration.

rules.name: The Flat-by-Default Rule
rules.body: Add shadow only when an element occupies a higher interaction layer.

dos: Use monospace for exact protocol values.
donts: Do not use playful SaaS styling.
Do not invent controls or add misleading affordances.
Do not hide essential metadata on mobile.
